cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, Mr. Joshi, sir. I hope you're doing well. My name is Rohan, and I'm calling from the tax department. We've been trying to reach you regarding your tax refund, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, hello! I've been expecting a refund, but I didn't receive any email or call. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I completely understand your concern, Mr. Joshi. You see, we've identified that you're eligible for an additional refund, but we need to verify some information to process it electronically. It's a new policy, sir.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 21s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: Tax refund phishing scam. Scammer sends email or calls claiming victim is entitled to additional tax refund but needs to "verify" bank account information or Social Security number to process the refund electronically.
